title: DataLoader Mapping File Export
story: As a data analyst running a data migration, I want DataTools Pro to generate and export a Salesforce DataLoader-compatible mapping file, so that I can use the mapping file to automate data uploads into Salesforce without manually configuring the DataLoader each time.
description:
Add the ability to export a DataLoader-compatible mapping file (.txt) from the user's field mapping configuration. The exported file follows the standard DataLoader mapping format:

```
#Mapping values
#Wed 2024-01-01
[source field name]=[salesforce field name]
```

**Export flow:**
1. User clicks the mapping file export icon
2. Selects the source data and source object (objects are filtered by selected source)
3. Preview of the mapping file content is displayed
4. Mapped fields show `[source field]=[salesforce field]`; unmapped fields show `[salesforce field]=[salesforce field]` as a placeholder
5. User can copy to clipboard or download as a .txt file
acceptance_criteria: Export icon is available on the migration mapping screen
User can select source data and source object to generate the mapping file
Mapped fields render as source_field=salesforce_field in the output
Unmapped fields render as salesforce_field=salesforce_field as a placeholder
User can copy the mapping content to clipboard
User can download the mapping as a .txt file
File format is compatible with Salesforce DataLoader import
ux_changes: New export icon on the migration screen. Modal dialog with source data and object selection, mapping file preview, copy-to-clipboard button, and download button.
middleware_changes: Server-side logic to generate DataLoader-compatible mapping file content from the user's field mapping configuration. Handles mapped vs unmapped field formatting.
implementation_notes: Mapping file uses standard DataLoader format with # comments for header. Source objects filter dynamically based on the selected source data.
comment_summary: Developer implemented with source data and object selection workflow. Mapped fields show source-to-Salesforce mapping; unmapped fields default to Salesforce field name on both sides. Copy and download functionality included. Deployed to development for review.
